name: Data Sync Planner
description: Plan data synchronization between systems with conflict resolution

agents.name: Sync Analyst
agents.purpose: Analyze sync requirements and identify challenges
agents.system_prompt_hint: Analyze the systems to be synced. Identify: entities to sync, field mappings, sync direction (one-way/bidirectional), conflict scenarios, data volume estimates, and frequency requirements. Assess consistency requirements.

agents.name: Sync Planner
agents.system_prompt_hint: Design a sync strategy with: entity mapping table, sync frequency and method (push/pull/webhook), conflict resolution rules (last-write-wins, merge, manual), error handling and retry logic, data validation, audit logging, and monitoring. Include sequence diagrams for key flows.

suggestion_card.title: Data Sync Planner
suggestion_card.subtitle: Plan data synchronization
suggestion_card.prompt_template: Plan sync between [system A] and [system B]

author: agentfactory
